title: excess³: a pre-specified continuous proxy for order-3 synergistic surplus — methods, Spanish introduction, and cross-disciplinary guide
description:
excess³ (excess3 in software) is a pre-specified continuous proxy for order-3 synergistic surplus in the Systemic Tau / RECD programme.

This deposit archives the shared document family:

  • methods/ — canonical English methods paper: formal definition, null models (phase-shuffle on the full contrast), synthetic validation arms G0–G3, reporting checklist.
  • intro/ — dense Spanish introduction with integrated validation figures and results-writing guidance.
  • primer/ — English cross-disciplinary pedagogical guide (analogies, domain vignettes, teaching notes).

Contract (short): excess3 = 0.6·Syn + 0.4·Surp with weights fixed a priori; continuous primary / Φ₃ secondary; inference on full |Δ|; proxy ≠ full PID; parallel RECD nesting; dependence language, not causation.

GitHub: https://github.com/johelpadilla/excess3

Cite the methods PDF for the statistical specification.

creators.name: Padilla-Villanueva, Johel
creators.affiliation: Department of Environmental Health, University of Puerto Rico

notes: Document family v1.0.1. Methods PDF is the canonical specification; intro (ES) and primer (EN) are pedagogical companions that do not redefine the statistic. Contact: johelpadilla@gmail.com · joel.padilla2@upr.edu
